NCR Air Quality vs Property Prices — 2021
47 CPCB stations · 7,582 properties · Hedonic pricing regression
Key Finding
A 100-point increase in annual AQI is associated with a 23.9% reduction in property price per sqft (p < 0.001, N = 7,582)

Policy implication: Reducing above-average AQI zones to NCR average would unlock ₹117 crore in property wealth, with Ghaziabad accounting for ₹57 crore.
